zh.Of, Mackworth, Derbyshire, England: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾麥可沃斯
zh.Mackworth, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾麥可沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: Simon Touchet of Tackley and Willington是Matthew Touchet的兒子，於大約1136年出生在英國德比夏爾麥可沃斯。他於大約1157年與Alice de Coleville在英國爾布格拉福頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1203年在英國德比夏爾維林頓享年69歲。

zh-hans.Of, Mackworth, Derbyshire, England: 英国英格兰德比夏爾麥可沃斯
zh-hans.Mackworth, Derbyshire, England: 英国德比夏爾麥可沃斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Simon Touchet of Tackley and Willington是Matthew Touchet的儿子，于大约1136年出生在英国德比夏爾麥可沃斯。他于大约1157年与Alice de Coleville在英国爾布格拉福頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1203年在英国德比夏爾維林頓享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Touchet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Anastasie, Denys, Evest, Minos, Rodolph, Vernice.
French: topographic name for someone who lived by a small grove, from a diminutive of Old French toche ‘grove’.
History: René Touchet from Thorigné-d'Anjou in Maine-et-Loire, France, married Marie Caillé in Saint-Laurent, Île-de-Montreal, QC, in 1746.

variants.name: Touchette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Marcel, Pierre, Armand, Collette, Euclide, Henri, Hilaire, Huguette.
Altered form of French Touchet , reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

en.lifeSummary: Simon Touchet of Tackley and Willington was born about 1136, in Mackworth, Derbyshire, England as the son of Matthew Touchet. He married Alice de Coleville about 1157, in Buglawton, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died about 1203, in Willington, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Simon Touchet of Tackley and Willington est né environ 1136, à Mackworth, Derbyshire, Angleterre, fils de Matthew Touchet. Il a épousé Alice de Coleville environ 1157, à Buglawton, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1203, à Willington, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Simon Touchet of Tackley and Willington wurde um 1136 in Mackworth, Derbyshire, England, als Sohn von Matthew Touchet geboren. Er hat um 1157 in Buglawton, Cheshire, England Alice de Coleville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1203 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Willington, Derbyshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Simon Touchet of Tackley and Willington è nato il circa 1136 nel Mackworth, Derbyshire, England come figlio di Matthew Touchet. Lui sposato Alice de Coleville circa 1157, nel Buglawton, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1203, nel Willington, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon Touchet of Tackley and Willingtonは約1136年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアマックウオルスでMatthew Touchetの息子として生まれた。約1157年にイギリスチェシュアイアブグラウトンでAlice de Colevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は約1203年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアウィリントンで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon Touchet of Tackley and Willington(은)는 대략 1136년 영국 더비실르 맥k워스에서 Matthew Touchet의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1157년 영국 체실르 버글로턴에서 Alice de Coleville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1203년 영국 더비실르 윌링턴에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1136–about 1203: tany ho any amin'ny 1136–tany ho any amin'ny 1203

mn.Of, Mackworth, Derbyshire, England: Mackworth, Deorbyscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Simon Touchet of Tackley and Willington nasceu aproximadamente 1136, em Mackworth, Derbyshire, Inglaterra filho de Matthew Touchet. Ele casou-se com Alice de Coleville aproximadamente 1157, em Buglawton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1203, em Willington, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Simon Touchet of Tackley and Willington родился около 1136 г. в местности маккворт, дирбишир, Англия. Его отца звали Matthew Touchet. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Coleville около 1157 г. в местности буглавтон, чешир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер около 1203 г. в местности уиллингтон, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет.

sm.about 1136–about 1203: e tusa o le 1136–e tusa o le 1203

es.lifeSummary: Simon Touchet of Tackley and Willington nació aproximadamente 1136, en Mackworth, Derbyshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Matthew Touchet. Se casó con Alice de Coleville aproximadamente 1157, en Buglawton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió aproximadamente 1203, en Willington, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años.
